title: Build pilot flight logbook with comprehensive tracking and reporting

requirements.text: Create backend data models for Student (with name field), Instructor (with name field), Aircraft (with registration/tail number field), and Exercise (with name/description field)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores and retrieves Students with unique IDs and names
Backend stores and retrieves Instructors with unique IDs and names
Backend stores and retrieves Aircraft with unique IDs and registration numbers
Backend stores and retrieves Exercises with unique IDs and names

requirements.text: Create backend FlightLog data model with fields: date (Text), studentId (Text), instructorId (Text), aircraftId (Text), exerciseId (Text), flightType ("Solo" or "Dual"), landingType ("Day" or "Night"), landingCount (Nat), takeoffTime (Text in HH:MM format), landingTime (Text in HH:MM format), totalHours (Float)
acceptanceCriteria: FlightLog entries can be created with all specified fields
FlightLog entries include date, student, instructor, aircraft, and exercise references
FlightLog captures flight type (Solo/Dual), landing type (Day/Night), landing count, and times
TotalHours is calculated from takeoff and landing times

requirements.text: Implement backend CRUD operations for Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises (create, read all, update, delete)

quotes: ➕ Separate Add Student / Instructor / Aircraft / Exercise

acceptanceCriteria: Backend provides methods to add new Student, Instructor, Aircraft, and Exercise entries
Backend provides methods to retrieve all entries for each entity type
Backend provides methods to update existing entries
Backend provides methods to delete entries by ID

requirements.text: Implement backend CRUD operations for FlightLog entries (create, read all, update, delete) with automatic total hours calculation from takeoff and landing times
acceptanceCriteria: Backend calculates total hours automatically when creating or updating flight logs
Backend provides method to create new flight log entries
Backend provides method to retrieve all flight log entries
Backend provides method to update existing flight log entries
Backend provides method to delete flight log entries by ID

requirements.text: Implement backend reporting methods: getStudentTotalHours(studentId) returning total flight hours for a student, and getInstructorReport(instructorId) returning total hours and flight count for an instructor
acceptanceCriteria: Backend method returns sum of all flight hours for a given student ID
Backend method returns sum of all flight hours and count of flights for a given instructor ID
Reports aggregate data accurately from all flight log entries

requirements.text: Implement backend method to export all flight log data as CSV format, returning text content with headers: Date, Student, Instructor, Aircraft, Exercise, Flight Type, Landing Type, Landing Count, Takeoff Time, Landing Time, Total Hours
acceptanceCriteria: Backend method returns CSV-formatted text with all flight log data
CSV includes header row with all field names
CSV resolves foreign key references to show names instead of IDs
CSV data is properly escaped and formatted

requirements.text: Create frontend form to add new Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises with separate add buttons/dialogs for each entity type

quotes: ➕ Separate Add Student / Instructor / Aircraft / Exercise

acceptanceCriteria: UI provides separate controls to add Students with name input
UI provides separate controls to add Instructors with name input
UI provides separate controls to add Aircraft with registration input
UI provides separate controls to add Exercises with name/description input
Each add form validates input and calls backend create methods

requirements.text: Create frontend flight log entry form with: date field auto-populated with today's date and calendar picker for manual change, dropdown selectors for Student, Instructor, Aircraft, and Exercise populated from backend, toggle for Solo/Dual flight type, toggle for Day/Night landing type, numeric input for landing count, time inputs for takeoff and landing times (HH:MM format), auto-calculated and displayed total hours, and submit button
acceptanceCriteria: Date field defaults to current date on form load
Date can be changed via calendar picker UI component
All dropdowns populate from backend data (Students, Instructors, Aircraft, Exercises)
Flight type toggle switches between Solo and Dual
Landing type toggle switches between Day and Night
Landing count accepts positive integers
Takeoff and landing time inputs accept HH:MM format
Total hours displays automatically calculated value as times are entered
Submit button calls backend to create new flight log entry

requirements.text: Create frontend table/list view to display all flight log entries with columns: Date, Student, Instructor, Aircraft, Exercise, Flight Type, Landing Type, Landing Count, Takeoff Time, Landing Time, Total Hours, and action buttons for Edit and Delete on each row
acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all flight log entries retrieved from backend
Each row shows all flight log fields with resolved names (not IDs)
Edit button on each row opens form pre-populated with entry data
Delete button on each row removes the entry after confirmation
Table updates automatically after create, edit, or delete operations

requirements.text: Implement frontend edit functionality: clicking Edit on a flight log entry opens the entry form pre-filled with existing data, allows modification of all fields, and saves changes to backend on submit
acceptanceCriteria: Edit button populates form with all existing entry data
All fields (date, dropdowns, toggles, times, counts) are editable
Submit in edit mode calls backend update method
Table refreshes with updated data after successful edit
Form can be cancelled to discard changes

requirements.text: Implement frontend delete functionality: clicking Delete on a flight log entry shows confirmation dialog, and on confirmation calls backend delete method and refreshes the table
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button shows confirmation dialog before deletion
Confirmed delete calls backend delete method
Table refreshes and entry is removed after successful deletion
Cancelled delete leaves entry unchanged

requirements.text: Create frontend reporting views: Student-wise report showing each student's name and total flight hours, and Instructor-wise report showing each instructor's name, total flight hours, and number of flights
acceptanceCriteria: Student report displays list of all students with total hours for each
Instructor report displays list of all instructors with total hours and flight count for each
Reports call backend aggregation methods
Reports update when new flight logs are added

requirements.text: Implement frontend Export to Excel button that calls backend CSV export method and triggers browser download of the CSV file with flight log data
acceptanceCriteria: Export button is visible and accessible in UI
Clicking export calls backend CSV export method
Browser downloads CSV file with all flight log data
CSV file opens correctly in spreadsheet applications
Filename includes date or identifier (e.g., flight-logs-YYYY-MM-DD.csv)

constraints: Use Motoko for all backend logic in a single actor file
Use React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for the frontend
All time calculations must handle edge cases (e.g., flights crossing midnight)
Date format must be consistent throughout the application
All entity references must be validated (e.g., studentId must exist before creating flight log)
nonGoals: Mobile app development or Android APK generation
Multi-tenant or user authentication beyond Internet Identity
Advanced reporting with charts or graphs
Import functionality for existing flight log data
Integration with external flight tracking systems
